Keyboard height Bottom offset Set custom keyboard color Hide special characters Hide language switch key Switch to other keyboards Show separate number row Space swipe cursor move Delete swipe Use matching navigation bar color WittyKeys isn’t enabled yet. \n\nTap “OK” to open your device’s Language & Input settings. \n\nDon’t worry — you can switch back anytime. \n\nJust select WittyKeys as your current keyboard to start using smart AI typing! Enabled keyboard languages Add language Remove language %s keyboard layouts Change keyboard Privacy Policy License No Internet. Server is not responding. Error fetching response. %1$s%2$s Choose a category or option 🤔 Select an intent category 🤔 Select a tone 🤔
Get Started ● Tap “Open Settings” ● Select “Wittykeys” ● Enable “Wittykeys” as your default keyboard ● You can switch back anytime. We respect your privacy.
● Enable “Wittykeys” in Settings Accessibility ● WittyKeys enhances how you interact with text across your apps. When you need to do something with text on your screen—like translate it, share it, or search for related information—WittyKeys can help. It temporarily reads the text to perform your chosen action, ensuring your data remains private and is never saved.
Terms Of Use & Privacy Policy 626366493162-dfru8tes08enosjav996dq6vdhpnijk8.apps.googleusercontent.com In the AI Assistant view, you can maintain a continuous conversation with the ChatGPT model. This means that subsequent prompts or questions will be treated as part of the ongoing dialogue, allowing you to ask follow-up questions and engage in more in-depth discussions without repeatedly providing context. Please note that these conversations are not currently saved; initiating a new prompt will begin a fresh interaction. We are actively developing a feature to enable local saving of conversations in future versions, allowing you to easily resume previous discussions without losing your history. WittyKeys Take control of text in any app with WittyKeys. It lets you interact with on-screen text in powerful ways, such as translating, sharing, or looking up information. WittyKeys only reads text when you initiate an action and never stores your data. Before you cancel your subscription, we\'d love to understand if there\'s anything we could do better. If you’ve encountered any issues or if there’s something we can improve, please let us know – we’re always looking for ways to enhance your experience!
\n\n If you decide to proceed with cancellation, your subscription will end at the next billing cycle, and you’ll still have access to all premium features until then.
\n\nIf you have any questions or concerns, or if you’re unsure about canceling, feel free to reach out to us at contact@wittykeys.com. We’re here to assist you and would love the opportunity to address any issues.
\n\nTo cancel your subscription, click below: Before you proceed with deleting your account, we\'d love to understand why you\'re leaving. Is there anything we could have done differently to enhance your experience?
\n\nIf you have any concerns, feedback, or need assistance, please don\'t hesitate to reach out to us at contact@wittykeys.com. We\'re here to help and would love to address any issues you may have!
\n\nPlease remember that once your account is deleted, all your data, preferences, and history will be permanently removed, and this action cannot be undone.
\n\nIf you\'re sure you want to delete your account, click below to confirm.
SCREEN_READER_EVENT ENABLE_ACCESSIBILITY DISABLE_ACCESSIBILITY
//Values contact@wittykeys.com +919266445733 https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=project.witty.keys https://wittykeys.com/privacy-policy
WittyKeys Plus active Free AI credits ready Use Overlay, Keyboard, replies, scan, tone, grammar, translate, and AI Chat with daily credits. Daily AI credits used Free trial ended Upgrade for more AI credits Increase your AI credit allowance when daily use grows. 20 free AI credits/day Try Reply, Scan, Tone, Grammar, Translate, and AI Chat daily. Enjoy Wittykeys!
// Optional strings for the separate card: Free Trial Quota: Free Trial Ended Subscribe to continue using Witty Keys! Free Quota: Login To Start Start Free Trial Subscribe Now
//fb configuration
Copy Reply Apply
Copied to clipboard Editor not available. Reply inserted — edit if needed, then send. Please type something first. No text to translate.
Show details Hide details
Clear Chat Type a follow-up… Info
Switch to keyboard Expand Collapse Analyzing conversation Unable to analyze conversation \u26A1 Couldn\'t connect Retry \u21BB Retry Close Use Keyboard Report content WittyKeys AI Content Report I would like to report the following AI-generated content:\n\n---\nFeature: Smart Reply\nContent:\n \n---\n\nReason for report:\n[Please describe why you\'re reporting this content]\n\n---\nApp Version: %1$s\nTimestamp: %2$s
Memory View Close Collapse Collapse Emotional Analysis Conversation Summary Suggested Replies Recommended Actions No recommendations available Intensity: %1$s Translated from %1$s Schedule a call Share document Set reminder Send email summary
Type prompt in chat, tap Generate → Generate Cancel custom mode
🔓 Enable AI features for smart replies Enable Accessibility Service Permission WittyKeys requires Accessibility Service permission to provide these AI-powered features:\n\n✓ Smart reply suggestions based on conversation\n✓ Emotional context analysis\n✓ Auto-translation detection\n✓ Context-aware tone suggestions\n\nYour data stays on device and is never stored. Grant Permission Cancel
🧠 💬 🎭 ✓ 🌐 📖 📋 🎤 ↓ ↔ ← 🔄 ✕ 🚩 ✓ 🔓 🔒 ❤️ 👀 ✏️ … 😊 🛡️ 📱 📞 📅 🌐

Switch to Memory View AI Chat Tone Grammar Translate Read Aloud Clipboard Voice Input Collapse toolbar Expand toolbar Tap an AI feature to get started Enable AI features for smart replies Enable Cancel
↓ scroll for suggestions Regenerate
Unlock AI Features WittyKeys needs Accessibility permission to read messages and provide smart replies. Smart Replies AI-powered reply suggestions based on conversation Emotion Detection Understand the emotional context of messages Context Awareness Know who you\'re talking to and adapt Privacy First Data stays on device, never stored or shared We only read visible message content. No data is stored or sent to third parties. Not Now Enable Now
Type your instruction…
Start typing or open a chat +%d more
